zh.lifeSummary: 當George Kaye於1454年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾武德頌 李斯時，他的父親John Kaye III52歲，母親Jane Lacy37歲。他於大約1482年與Margaret Elizabeth Radcliffe在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1504年在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Kaye于1454年出生在英国英格兰越可爾武德頌 李斯时，他的父亲John Kaye III52岁，母亲Jane Lacy37岁。他于大约1482年与Margaret Elizabeth Radcliffe在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1504年在英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kaye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire), Irish (Kerry), and North German: variant of   Kay  . Compare   Keye  .

variants.name: Kay
meanings: English: nickname from northern Middle English ka, kae, kay ‘jackdaw’, from Old Norse ká or Old English cā. See also Daw .
English: nickname from Middle English cai, kay, kei ‘left-handed, clumsy’.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English kai(e), kei(e) ‘key’, applied to a maker of keys (compare Kear ), or alluding to the office of keeper or bearer of keys, but clear evidence for this is wanting.

variants.name: Keye
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire), Irish (Kildare), and North German: variant of   Kaye  .

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When George Kaye was born in 1454, in Woodsome Lees, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Kaye III, was 52 and his mother, Jane Lacy, was 37. He married Margaret Elizabeth Radcliffe about 1482, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1504, in West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Kaye est né en 1454, à Woodsome Lees, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Kaye III, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Jane Lacy, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Elizabeth Radcliffe environ 1482, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1504, à West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ko.St Briavel Castle, Gloucestershire, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 스트 브리아벨스 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: George Kaye(이)가 1454년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 우드소 리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Kaye III(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Lacy(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1482년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Margaret Elizabeth Radcliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1504년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.St Briavel Castle, Gloucestershire, Engl: ст брявелс кастл, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Kaye родился в 1454 г. в местности вудсом лись, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Kaye III было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Lacy, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Elizabeth Radcliffe около 1482 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1504 г. в местности вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.
